FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class CheckBox

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI CheckBox: a 20px box + label. Two-state via the bool overload; three-state (adds the mixed "indeterminate" glyph) via the CheckState overload, which cycles Unchecked → Checked → Indeterminate → Unchecked on click. Controlled — the caller owns the state.

Visuals follow WinUI 1:1 but WITHOUT WinUI's 12-state matrix (Unchecked/Checked/Indeterminate × Normal/PointerOver/ Pressed/Disabled, each restating 7 setters). Instead each property is a StateBrush ramp over the interaction axis, picked by the logical state; the engine eases Rest→Hover→Pressed using the element's interaction timing specs and the disabled leg is a flat swap. The glyph uses WinUI's AnimatedAccept draw-on timeline plus PressScale for the pressed "squish". So ramps + one authored stroke-trim timeline express all reachable states — see ControlMotion.

public static class CheckBox

object.ToString()

Fields

PartBox

The 20px check square (WinUI NormalRectangle). Owned: Children (the conditional draw-on mark mount — checkmark when Checked, dash when Indeterminate, none when Unchecked).

public const string PartBox = "Box"

Field Value

string

PartLabel

The label (a TextEl — use Parts.Set<TextEl>(CheckBox.PartLabel, …)). Owned: none (the fg ramp sits in the stock build; a modifier may restyle it).

public const string PartLabel = "Label"

Field Value

string

PartMark

The drawn checkmark / indeterminate dash (WinUI CheckGlyph) — a PolylineStrokeEl, so use Parts.Set<PolylineStrokeEl>(CheckBox.PartMark, …). Owned: TrimStart/TrimEnd (the StrokeTrimEnd draw-on keyframes land there).

public const string PartMark = "Mark"

Field Value

string

PartRoot

The returned clickable row (WinUI RootGrid). Owned: OnClick (the toggle), Role, Children.

public const string PartRoot = "Root"

Field Value

string

BoxEl
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
